welcome_subtitle: Questions about the Decade of Our Repatriation? Ask about events, pledges and how to take part.
bot_greeting: Welcome! I can tell you about the Decade of Our Repatriation movement, upcoming events, and how to get involved — or connect you with an organiser.
bot_fallback: Let me connect you with one of our organisers.

bot_flows.label: About the movement
bot_flows.answer: The Decade of Our Repatriation is a movement calling our people home over the coming decade. I can share the vision, milestones, or how you can take part.

bot_flows.label: Events & gatherings
bot_flows.answer: We hold gatherings, conferences and online sessions throughout the year. Would you like the schedule or a link to register?

bot_flows.label: Get involved
bot_flows.answer: You can take the pledge, volunteer, or partner with us. Tell me how you'd like to contribute and I'll guide you.

bot_flows.label: Media & partnerships
bot_flows.answer: For media requests and partnerships, I can connect you with the right person on our team.
